name: phd2-log-viewer
description: Install PHDLogView (Andy Galasso's offline PHD2 guide-log analyzer). Companion to the phd2 provider (separate app, separate installer).
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$log = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\phd2-log-viewer-verify.log'; $smoke = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\phd2-log-viewer-smoke.txt'; $candidates = @((Join-Path $env:ProgramFiles 'PHDLogView\phdlogview.exe'), 'C:\Program Files\PHDLogView\phdlogview.exe', 'C:\Program Files (x86)\PHDLogView\phdlogview.exe'); $exe = $null; foreach ($p in $candidates) { if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $p) { $exe = $p; break } }; if ($exe) { Set-Content -Path $log -Value ('PHDLogView at ' + $exe); Set-Content -Path $smoke -Value 'phd2_log_viewer_ok' } else { 'phdlogview.exe not found' | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
